{{CargoRelic
|name=Indestructible Body
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Defeating Frog Vajra
|description=After years of training, the Milk Dragon forged an invincible golden form... though it still has unexpected weaknesses.
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=29
|civ=14
|tech=18
|ss1=Each round, Ri-Ribbit DEF +1<br>Per 3 Shrine Frog Zaps, Ri-Ribbit DEF +1<br>Frogs Killed: 30/30
|ss2=Each round, Ri-Ribbit DEF +2<br>Per 3 Shrine Frog Zaps, Ri-Ribbit DEF +2<br>Frogs Killed: 30/30
|ss3=Each round, Ri-Ribbit DEF +3<br>Per 3 Shrine Frog Zaps, Ri-Ribbit DEF +3<br>Frogs Killed: 30/30
}}
